content: I am anxious and cannot stop ruminating about my presentation

It sounds like you're feeling really overwhelmed with anxiety about your presentation, and that’s completely understandable. It’s common to get caught up in those thoughts, especially when something feels important.

What specific thoughts are you ruminating on? Identifying them can help you gain some clarity. 

Let’s try to reframe this a bit: instead of focusing on the “what ifs,” consider that you’ve prepared for this and you have the ability to handle whatever comes your way. 

As a small next step, take a moment to ground yourself. You can try the 5-4-3-2-1 exercise: identify 5 things you can see, 4 things you can touch, 3 things you can hear, 2 things you can smell, and 1 thing you can taste. This can help bring you back to the present moment.
